name: Scar / Shanghen
description:
In which that first fight with him takes a turn for the worse(or better, depending on you hehe)

he is so cute, for like no fucking reason-

also, i made this while listening to He Say She Say Crash Test Dummie on repeat(it may have influenced me)

anyways, dubcon warning(potential noncon, but we all know what we signed up for)

also if there is any lore inconsistency, please lmk. i've barely made a dent in the Wuthering Waves quests, so i do not know much :sobs:
